programme.title: Three's Company
programme.sub-title: Bob and Carol and Larry and Terri
programme.desc: By the time an innocent story is retold through several people, the trio believes Bob and Carol's marriage is on the rocks. Larry and Terri try to straighten things out with the couple - only to be "caught" by Mr. Furley.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Larry completely trusts Jack to show his teenage sister around town - until he discovers that they are still out at 2 AM.

programme.title: Too Close For Comfort
programme.desc: Henry regrets fixing up Sara with a pro baseball player when he learns that the young man has a drug problem.

programme.title: Too Close For Comfort
programme.desc: An open anchorwoman position at the TV station pits pretty, young Sara against a plain but exÂ­perienced newswoman.

programme.title: Too Close For Comfort
programme.desc: Monroe's mysterious friend visiting from Florida turns out to be a runaway 17-year-old girl.

programme.title: Too Close For Comfort
programme.desc: Henry hires Monroe as his assistant after Monroe is rejected for every post-college job he applies for.

programme.title: Too Close For Comfort
programme.desc: Monroe plays the stock market and the horses with the aid of a borrowed computer.

programme.title: Too Close For Comfort
programme.desc: Monroe's canine security partner keeps Henry at bay overnight.

programme.title: Too Close For Comfort
programme.desc: On her way to China, Muriel's natural mother pays a visit to the Rush household, but Muriel refuses to meet her.

programme.title: Too Close For Comfort
programme.desc: A weekend rendezvous with an old flame sends Iris into a romantic tailspin.

programme.title: Too Close For Comfort
programme.desc: Sara's date falls in love at first sight, but it's Jackie who is the apple of his eye.

programme.title: Talk About
programme.desc: Sean & Laura vs. Sam & Leslee

programme.title: Talk About
programme.desc: JP & Riyaz vs. Fiona & James

programme.title: Talk About
programme.desc: JP & Riyaz vs. Dave & Jacquie

programme.title: Talk About
programme.desc: JP & Riyaz vs. Kay & Colleen

programme.title: My Family
programme.desc: Ben and Susan attend an auction at Michael's school, where they successfully bid on a couple's therapy session. Meanwhile, Ben tries to avoid a former patient.

programme.title: My Family
programme.desc: Ben's cousin's daughter Abi is invited to dinner. Nick becomes a magician.

programme.title: Check It Out
programme.desc: When Cobb's is taken over by a huge conglomerate that also owns a famous hotel chain, Bannister has visions of becoming the manager of a luxury resort.

programme.title: Check It Out
programme.desc: Marlene finds herself the object of a secret admirer who leaves her flowers and love notes. At the same time, Bannister starts giving advice to Derek, the young bag boy who might be in over his head.

programme.title: Check It Out
programme.desc: Bannister learns that the new owners have sent out a corporate spy to infiltrate Cobb's and warns the staff to be on guard. The result is an atmosphere of paranoia as everyone suspects each other of spying.

programme.title: Check It Out
programme.desc: When Bannister learns Cobb's is to be featured on an investigative news program, he gets excited at the thought of being seen on television coast-to-coast. The trouble happens when the show writer decides she doesn't want him to be seen.

programme.title: Check It Out
programme.desc: The staff has prepared a little celebration for Bannister who won the "Manager of the Year" Award. The award comes with a trip to Hawaii, but when food goes missing, Bannister's new title and trip get put on the line.

programme.title: Check It Out
programme.desc: Leslie is excited by the news that he has won an audition to a famous acting school. He hires a famous actress to coach him, but is shocked to find his coach drunk and hopeless.

programme.title: Check It Out
programme.desc: Memories may be a beautiful thing but the staff at Cobb's find themselves wishing to forget some of their past mistakes for the 50th anniversary of Cobb's.

programme.title: Check It Out
programme.desc: Cobb's is in the middle of 'Swiss Week' but Bannister has traveling plans of his own; he's to be interviewed for a job in Italy. But there's no mention of him taking Edna. Suddenly an alarm in the store goes off and changes all his plans.

programme.title: Check It Out
programme.desc: Howard is thrilled with the new video security system until he learns that one of the pieces of outmoded equipment it promises to replace is Alf Scully. Bannister's please to Mrs. Cobb go unheeded and Alf is let go. After receiving a bomb threat, Mrs. Cobb has a change of heart.

programme.title: Check It Out
programme.desc: Edna has found out she's pregnant! As soon as Howard is in a good modd, she plans to tell him. Unfortunately this seems to be Howard's worst week so she's forced to tell him in less than ideal circumstances.

programme.title: Check It Out

programme.desc: A recently-deposed European monarch seeks shelter in New York City, where he becomes an accidental television celebrity and is later wrongly accused of being a Communist.

programme.title: The Poppy Is Also a Flower
programme.desc: In an attempt to stem the heroin trade from Iran, a group of narcotics agents working for the UN inject a radioactive compound into a shipment of opium, in the hopes that it will lead them to the main heroin distributor in Europe. Along the way, they encounter a mysterious woman doing her own investigation of the smuggling operation. Together, they follow the trail as it leads them through the back alleys and luxury resorts of Europe.

programme.title: The Trouble with Spies
programme.desc: George Trent (James Willis), a British spy, has gone incommunicado in Ibiza. Appleton Porter (Donald Sutherland) is sent to find out what happened to Trent. Porter settles into a small hotel with several busybody guests. He probes them for information about Trent, their former neighbor. Meanwhile, the spy survives several attempts on his life as he attempts to solve the mystery.

programme.desc: This movie chronicles Jack London’s epic journey from San Francisco to the Klondike gold fields in 1898.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Expeditions
programme.desc: Convinced the medieval witch trials were a Judeo-Christian attempt to exterminate the Aryans, Himmler established a special team led by Reinhard Heydrich to build a database of medieval German witchcraft practices.

programme.title: Combat Ships
programme.desc: The Battle of Leyte Gulf tells the story of the largest sea conflict in history involving Pearl Harbor warships and the largest battleships in the world, and how the US Navy, despite kamikaze attacks and a Japanese decoy fleet, were victorious.

programme.title: Combat Ships
programme.desc: In this episode we look at vessels built for amphibious combat. We begin by looking at the last reaming Landing Craft Tank (LCT) to serve on D-Day – LCT 7074. These huge landing craft were essential in delivering tanks, trucks, soldiers and supplies.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Expeditions
programme.sub-title: The Quest for the Holy Grail
programme.desc: As the Third Reich rises to power, Himmler and the SS become fixated on the Holy Grail, interpreting much of the myth surrounding it as fact - and the quest for it as attainable.

programme.title: Combat Ships
programme.desc: Learn about life on a Tudor ship from objects found on the Mary Rose, while on HMS Victory discover the battle-winning tactics of Admiral Nelson.

programme.title: Soviet Storm
programme.desc: Stalin’s USSR was highly experienced in espionage. Yet Hitler’s invasion still caught the Soviets off-guard. Thereafter, though, the GRU and NKVD went on to score amazing intelligence coups in Tokyo, Washington and even the heart of Berlin.

programme.title: History Of Weapons
programme.desc: Ranged weapons guarantee a warrior's best chance of survival. International experts survey history’s most important ranged weapons, from the Roman spear and the English longbow, right up to the futuristic railgun.

programme.title: History Of Weapons
programme.desc: Examining how warfare entered a new dimension as attacks from the skies became possible with weapons from incendiary arrows to drones.

programme.title: Combat Ships
programme.desc: In the waters of Scapa Flow, discover sunken dreadnoughts that tell the story of how a U-Boat sank HMS Royal Oak. Later, on HMS Cavalier, we explore how a raid by commandos called Operation Chariot proved the vulnerability of the battleship.

programme.title: Combat Ships
programme.desc: The episode begins with the story of HMS Conqueror sinking the General Belgrano during the Falklands War. Later, a crew member from the USS Nautilus describes what it was like to serve on the world's first nuclear submarine.

programme.title: Combat Trains
programme.desc: Twenty-four-year-old Winston Churchill boarded an armoured train during the Boer War hoping for a newspaper scoop. He was captured, but became world famous after escaping.

programme.title: Combat Trains
programme.desc: The story of the trench warfare from the First World War is well known. What is less well known is that the efficiency of the railway networks of both sides helped cause that stalemate.

programme.title: Combat Ships
programme.desc: Viking combat ships changed the course of history. Their longships brought William the Conqueror’s troops to Hastings, adventurers to North America and raiders to plunder the Saxon kingdoms.

programme.title: Combat Ships
programme.desc: In Stealth we examine the methods ships have used to evade detection. With the advent of radar in WW2, ships that wanted to remain undetected had to find ways to hide.

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft
programme.desc: The Hawker Hurricane was the first RAF aircraft to fly over 300mph. Over half of every enemy aeroplane destroyed in the Battle of Britain was by a Hurricane, not a Spitfire.

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft
programme.desc: The McDonnell Douglas F-4 Phantom II. Regarded as one of the most important aircraft of the Cold War. It was a major part of the United States Air Force, Navy and Marine Corps, and was also used by many other countries.

programme.title: Combat Ships
programme.desc: Learn about life on a Tudor ship from objects found on the Mary Rose, while on HMS Victory discover the battle-winning tactics of Admiral Nelson.

programme.title: Combat Ships
programme.desc: In 1939, the German raider Atlantis was equipped with fake funnels and her sailors dressed as women pushing prams to fool Allied merchant ships. We also look at how merchant ships were painted with bizarre shapes to fool U-boats.

programme.title: World War Weird
programme.desc: A 23-year-old Hitler, living hand-to-mouth as a painter in Vienna, Austria, discovers a sacred spear in the city's Hofburg Museum.

programme.title: World War Weird
programme.desc: In 1943, the inmates of the Death Camp at Sobibor staged an organised rebellion against their Nazi oppressors.

programme.title: U-Boat Wargamers
programme.desc: When WW2 breaks out, an elite force of German U-boat commanders attempt to starve Britain into submission. Vera Mathews heads the reformed WRENS. Meanwhile retired naval commander Gilbert Roberts is desperate to return to his career.

programme.title: U-Boat Wargamers
programme.desc: After the fall of France in 1940, Dönitz’s trio of aces embark on a race to sink British merchant ships. In Britain, the woman who will frustrate his plans turns the Women’s Royal Naval Service into a force to be reckoned with.

programme.title: Soviet Storm
programme.desc: In January 1945 the Red Army launched an overwhelming assault against Germany. Soviet soldiers stormed German fortresses, uncovered evidence of Nazi death camps, and carried out their own terrible retribution against the German people.

programme.title: Soviet Storm
programme.desc: In August 1945 the Red Army launched a devastating assault against Japanese-occupied Manchuria on the same day Japan suffered its second nuclear attack, which helped force the Japanese leadership to recognise that the war was lost.

programme.desc: Nazi scientists conducted brutal experiments for an Aryan master race, while zoologists ran their own bizarre trial

programme.title: World War Weird
programme.desc: Nazi scientists conducted brutal experiments for an Aryan master race, while zoologists ran their own bizarre trial

programme.title: World War Weird
programme.desc: The Special Operations Executive, precursor to MI6, used a foul-smelling substance called 'S liquid' to undermine German and Japanese officers.

programme.title: The Lost Women Spies
programme.desc: Vera finds out her agents' fate. Her beliefs about Noor are challenged. Suspicions lead Vera to hunt down a Nazi mastermind.

programme.title: The Lost Women Spies

programme.desc: 1942 and Hitler has the totally barking idea of using educated dogs to do a soldier's job. The Nazi leader wants to create fearsome canines to help him win the Second World War.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Quique y Emilio llegan hasta el bar donde está Alberto con Alfonso, se sientan en una mesa cercana para vigilar al periodista - Gertrudis palidece cuando Lorena le cuenta que Claudio contrató a Pedro Lobo para que ordenara matar a Alberto.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: Tamara se presenta ante Clara Inés, quien se interesa en saber quién es la mujer.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: Raúl ha metido a varias amantes en su apartamento de soltero; en el corazón de Clara nace un nuevo sentimiento hacia Raúl: el odio.

programme.title: Te Tengo en Salsa
programme.desc: Derrotado ante las palabras de Adriana, Carlos Raúl le dice a su hermano que, con su actitud logró que la joven Palacios no quiera saber nada de ellos.

programme.title: Te Tengo en Salsa
programme.desc: Ninoska le ha preparado una sopa a Carlos Raúl, la mujer aprovecha la receptividad de Perroni para decirle que Adriana estaba en el cumpleaños dedicada por completo a César.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila divisa una mujer que corresponde a la descripción de su mamá. Antón, el sicario, también está allí y armado se dirige a ellas. Torrealba ordena a sus hombres correr hacia las mujeres, agarran a Camila y se llevan a la mujer.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosa Blanco hace una llamada a Fausto e inquieta a Ezequiel con amenazas contra él, Octavia y toda su familia. Camila escucha por primera vez la voz de su madre pero ella le comunica que la llama sólo para despedirse, ya que la quieren matar. Camila recibe un cuaderno que le envía Rosa.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Sólo Camila debe conocer el contenido de lo escrito en el cuaderno. Su ira y rabia va creciendo y piensa que su mamá tiene el derecho de vengarse. Las implicadas sienten miedo y nerviosismo ante lo contenido en el cuaderno. Max llama a Camila y aunque dice que lo ama mucho, no expresa alegría por la próxima boda.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Quique y Emilio llegan hasta el bar donde está Alberto con Alfonso, se sientan en una mesa cercana para vigilar al periodista - Gertrudis palidece cuando Lorena le cuenta que Claudio contrató a Pedro Lobo para que ordenara matar a Alberto.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Presionada por Omar, Lorena confiesa que Claudio es el asesino intelectual de Marco Aurelio, que fue él quien contrató a Pedro para que hiciera el trabajo. Iniciado el juicio, María Lourdes acusa a Isabel tildándola abiertamente de lesbiana y autora de la muerte, de su propio hermano. Gertrudis trata de “venderle” a Alberto una buena imagen de Claudio. Omar, afectado, acusa a Lorena de ser la autora material de la muerte de Marco Aurelio Corona.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: Raúl ha metido a varias amantes en su apartamento de soltero; en el corazón de Clara nace un nuevo sentimiento hacia Raúl: el odio.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: Fernando asegura a Giorgio que han atrapado a Cirilo Santa María; lo que apremia para que se marchen de la mansión con su víctima.

programme.title: Te Tengo en Salsa
programme.desc: Ninoska le ha preparado una sopa a Carlos Raúl, la mujer aprovecha la receptividad de Perroni para decirle que Adriana estaba en el cumpleaños dedicada por completo a César.

programme.title: Te Tengo en Salsa
programme.desc: El joven Perroni busca a su amada por todas partes, mientras ésta yace desmayada en la cava congeladora.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosa Blanco hace una llamada a Fausto e inquieta a Ezequiel con amenazas contra él, Octavia y toda su familia. Camila escucha por primera vez la voz de su madre pero ella le comunica que la llama sólo para despedirse, ya que la quieren matar. Camila recibe un cuaderno que le envía Rosa.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Sólo Camila debe conocer el contenido de lo escrito en el cuaderno. Su ira y rabia va creciendo y piensa que su mamá tiene el derecho de vengarse. Las implicadas sienten miedo y nerviosismo ante lo contenido en el cuaderno. Max llama a Camila y aunque dice que lo ama mucho, no expresa alegría por la próxima boda.

programme.title: La Trepadora
programme.desc: Nicolas has already left in search of his uncle when Florencia is visited by Moncho, who asks for a chance to earn her love, but their conversation is interrupted by Hilario's arrival. Jack hides his satisfaction in front of Victoria when she assures him that she doesn't care where and with whom Nicolas spent the night, as everything between them is still impossible. Given that Leopoldo’s body hasn’t appeared, Hilario decides to go to the city to tell Fernanda that Federico accidentally shot her father; her reaction causes her to faint. Eugenia, worried because she senses that something bad is happening, leaves a message for Leopoldo on his phone telling him how much she loves him. Nicolas is discouraged because he hasn’t found Leopoldo, but Florencia encourages him to keep the faith that he will find him. Federico gets scared when Moncho and another henchman want to forcibly remove him from the room where he is staying.

programme.title: La Trepadora
programme.desc: Nicolás informa a Hilario que fue a inspeccionar Los Samanes porque su tía y él quieren ponerla a producir lo antes posible, pero le aclara que el motivo real de su visita es que fue a exigirle que no vuelva a acercase a Florencia Zapata. Victoria no puede evitar sonreír cuando Sigfrido le avisa que va a llevarla a pasear para ver si se le quita la depresión. Florencia le confiesa a Fernanda que sabe que, aunque Nicolás ahora está a su lado, la sombra de Victoria es algo contra lo que ella va a tener que luchar siempre hasta que logre sacarla del corazón del joven. Mientras Victoria y Sigfrido juegan; Clementina le reprocha a Felipe que diga estar enamorado de ella cuando no hace nada estaba muriéndose de amor por Antonieta.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Quique y Emilio llegan hasta el bar donde está Alberto con Alfonso, se sientan en una mesa cercana para vigilar al periodista - Gertrudis palidece cuando Lorena le cuenta que Claudio contrató a Pedro Lobo para que ordenara matar a Alberto.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: El dolor, el odio y el resentimiento anidan en Camila por las verdades que ha descubierto. Camila, muy hermosa, lista para casarse, pide hablar con la Madre Isabel para preguntarle porqué la engaño durante tantos años. En su dolor, Camila le dice a Max que no puede casarse con él.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Presionada por Omar, Lorena confiesa que Claudio es el asesino intelectual de Marco Aurelio, que fue él quien contrató a Pedro para que hiciera el trabajo. programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Lorena le pide a Omar que le dé tiempo para hablar con su esposo y decirle ella misma toda la verdad sobre la muerte de su padre. Gertrudis sigue afectada de solo pensar que su hijo la rechace si llega a descubrir que es cómplice de Claudio. Alberto aún está con Alfonso cuando recibe la visita de Omar, quien informa que ya dio con la verdad sobre la muerte de Marco Aurelio Corona.

programme.desc: Raúl y Tamara reciben regalos por su aniversario de bodas; Velandró se incomoda al ver a Clara trabajando como doméstica en la mansión.

programme.title: La Trepadora
programme.desc: Eugenia está molesta porque Yosmir cree que Miguel quiere ser algo más que amigo de ella. Aunque Jack lo niega; Jonás sabe fue él quien contrató a unos hombres para que le dispararan a Victoria y así quedar ante la muchacha como un héroe, pues esos individuos se comunicaron con él para mandarle a decir que debe pagarles más de lo acordado. Florencia se pone celosa cuando Nicolás asegura que no descansará hasta saber quién atentó contra la vida de Victoria y le advierte que si ella encuentra la manera de castigar a la joven Guanipa por la muerte de Leopoldo no dudará en hacer que lo reciba.

Las implicadas sienten miedo y nerviosismo ante lo contenido en el cuaderno. Max llama a Camila y aunque dice que lo ama mucho, no expresa alegría por la próxima boda.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: El dolor, el odio y el resentimiento anidan en Camila por las verdades que ha descubierto. Camila, muy hermosa, lista para casarse, pide hablar con la Madre Isabel para preguntarle porqué la engaño durante tantos años. En su dolor, Camila le dice a Max que no puede casarse con él.

programme.title: La Trepadora
programme.desc: Nicolás informa a Hilario que fue a inspeccionar Los Samanes porque su tía y él quieren ponerla a producir lo antes posible, pero le aclara que el motivo real de su visita es que fue a exigirle que no vuelva a acercase a Florencia Zapata. Victoria no puede evitar sonreír cuando Sigfrido le avisa que va a llevarla a pasear para ver si se le quita la depresión. Florencia le confiesa a Fernanda que sabe que, aunque Nicolás ahora está a su lado, la sombra de Victoria es algo contra lo que ella va a tener que luchar siempre hasta que logre sacarla del corazón del joven. Mientras Victoria y Sigfrido juegan; Clementina le reprocha a Felipe que diga estar enamorado de ella cuando no hace nada estaba muriéndose de amor por Antonieta.

programme.title: La Trepadora
programme.desc: Eugenia está molesta porque Yosmir cree que Miguel quiere ser algo más que amigo de ella. Aunque Jack lo niega; Jonás sabe fue él quien contrató a unos hombres para que le dispararan a Victoria y así quedar ante la muchacha como un héroe, pues esos individuos se comunicaron con él para mandarle a decir que debe pagarles más de lo acordado. Florencia se pone celosa cuando Nicolás asegura que no descansará hasta saber quién atentó contra la vida de Victoria y le advierte que si ella encuentra la manera de castigar a la joven Guanipa por la muerte de Leopoldo no dudará en hacer que lo reciba.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Presionada por Omar, Lorena confiesa que Claudio es el asesino intelectual de Marco Aurelio, que fue él quien contrató a Pedro para que hiciera el trabajo. Iniciado el juicio, María Lourdes acusa a Isabel tildándola abiertamente de lesbiana y autora de la muerte, de su propio hermano. Gertrudis trata de “venderle” a Alberto una buena imagen de Claudio. Omar, afectado, acusa a Lorena de ser la autora material de la muerte de Marco Aurelio Corona.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Lorena le pide a Omar que le dé tiempo para hablar con su esposo y decirle ella misma toda la verdad sobre la muerte de su padre. Gertrudis sigue afectada de solo pensar que su hijo la rechace si llega a descubrir que es cómplice de Claudio. Alberto aún está con Alfonso cuando recibe la visita de Omar, quien informa que ya dio con la verdad sobre la muerte de Marco Aurelio Corona.

programme.title: Mitchell Pehlke Lacrosse Show
programme.desc: Welcome to Episode 9 (Season 3) of the Mitchell Pehlke Lacrosse Show presented by Duke Cannon. In this episode, we welcome back Syracuse attackman Joey Spallina after breaking the program record for career points. The crew also caught up with PLL Draft Analyst Adam Lamberti to get his reaction to the 2026 class and early ranking of the 2027 class. Kev and Hoagie debated the Big Ten naming four regular-season co-champions, while Mitch tried to get to the bottom of where Doogs was this week.
